reason: Admin analytics page changes must keep the independent super-admin app, shared contract usage, and dense operational UI conventions.
Statistic cards, controls, chart containers, and table styling must follow the warm matte tokens and rounded-md control rules.
Usage report fields are shared zod/ts-rest contracts consumed by admin, web, API, and gateway packages.
DicHA AI invoke usage, settlement cost recording, provider pricing, and admin analytics are governed by the AI catalog/invoke contract.
AiUsageEvent schema changes require Prisma 7 generation and database synchronization awareness.
The billing fix spans storage, gateway runtime, API aggregation, shared contracts, and frontend display.
